title: $100B Electronics Opportunity
description:
ndia and the US just finalized a trade deal that could significantly boost India’s electronics sector.

The US has cut tariffs on Indian imports from 50% to 18%, effective immediately.
Vietnam now faces a 20% tariff, a small gap that makes a big difference in global supply-chain decisions.
